query:
SELECT c.id, c.name, c.phone, lc.id as loyalty_card_id, lc.stamps, lc.completed_cards 
FROM customers c 
LEFT JOIN loyalty_cards lc ON c.id = lc.customer_id 
WHERE c.phone = '88999290000';
